meta.title: WillChain — Blockchain Digital Will
meta.description: WillChain is an automated digital will on the blockchain. Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir without lawyers or notaries.
meta.og_description: Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir. No lawyers. No bureaucracy. Forever on the blockchain.

hero.title: When you're gone — your assets will go to whomever you designate as your heir
hero.subtitle: Every year, thousands of people pass away without leaving instructions for their cryptocurrency. Loved ones know the funds exist but can't access them. WillChain solves this automatically.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: What happens to your cryptocurrency after you're gone?
problem.subtitle: Most people don't think about it until it's too late.
problem.card1_desc: If you're the only one who knows the private key, your funds disappear forever when you pass. No court or notary can help here.
problem.card2_desc: Billions of dollars in cryptocurrency sit untouched in abandoned wallets. Their owners are gone, and the funds are locked forever – nobody can use them.
problem.card3_desc: Even if they know the funds exist, without the key or password, family members can't access them. Legally, it's a dead end.

dashboard.smart_wallet_warning: ⚠️ Smart Wallet detected (MultiSig/Safe). Automatic timer resets with DApp interactions are limited. For reliability, manually click 'I'm Here!' before each scheduled deadline.
dashboard.vault_data_hint: Store encrypted data (IPFS CID, document CID, etc.) linked to your wallet.
dashboard.checkin_hint: Any WILL transfer also resets the timer.
dashboard.inactivity_period_hint: After this period of inactivity, your vault enters the grace period.
dashboard.dividends_hint: Accrued from funds recovered from abandoned wallets.
dashboard.activate_subtitle: Confirm your activity to start protecting your funds.
dashboard.activate_success_msg: Your activity timer has started. Designate an heir to complete your setup.

claim_vault.incoming_empty_hint: If any wallet designates you as its heir, it will appear here automatically.

claim_vault.title: Inherit a Wallet
claim_vault.hint: If you are the designated heir of an inactive wallet, enter the owner's address to initiate or complete a claim.
claim_vault.claim_in_progress_hint: The owner can cancel the claim during the cancellation window.
claim_vault.veto_expired_msg: Cancellation window closed. Transfer can be completed.

recycle.label: Recycle Funds
recycle.hint: If the wallet owner has completely disappeared (no activity beyond the set period + 60 days) and hasn't designated an heir, anyone can initiate the recycling of funds and receive a 1% reward.
recycle.status_inactive: Inactive — Not yet abandoned (total timeout not expired)

telegram.link_modal_hint: Sign the request with your wallet to confirm ownership. The signature will be automatically sent to the bot.
telegram.link_modal_success: ✅ Wallet Linked! Return to the Telegram bot.

how_it_works.label: 4 Steps
how_it_works.subtitle: Four simple steps and your crypto is secured
how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Buy WILL tokens on an exchange or receive them from another holder. Your digital will becomes active as soon as you hold any amount of WILL.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Specify the wallet address of the person who should receive your funds after your prolonged inactivity or death. This could be your spouse, child, friend – anyone you care about.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Any outgoing transaction automatically confirms your activity. If your wallet hasn't been used for a while, manually click 'I'm Here!'.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Set how long without activity triggers the WillChain mechanism: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. This is followed by a 30-day grace period and 30 days for the heir.

trust.noncustodial_desc: No one but your heir will get your funds

faq.label: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to log in daily?
faq.a1: No. If you regularly use your crypto wallet, the timer resets automatically. The 'I'm Here!' button is only needed if your wallet is completely unused.
faq.a2: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. You can change this anytime. Those who trade frequently choose 30 days, while long-term investors choose 365.
faq.q3: What happens if the period expires?
faq.a3: A 30-day grace period begins – you can still confirm your presence. Then, the heir has 30 days to initiate a claim. If no heir is designated or they don't claim in time, funds are recycled: 47% is burned forever, 47% is distributed to WILL holders, 5% goes to the protocol, and 1% to the initiator.
faq.q4: Can someone change my heir without my knowledge?
faq.a4: No. Only you, with your private key, can change the heir. The contract guarantees this.
faq.q5: Does anyone see my personal data?
faq.a5: No. Only your wallet address, balance, and activity timestamps are stored on the blockchain. No names or personal information.
faq.q6: Where is the smart contract located?
faq.a6: Deployed on the Base Sepolia testnet. The source code is open and verified on Basescan.
faq.q7: Does auto-timer reset work with multi-sig wallets?
faq.a7: If you use a standard wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet), the timer resets with any outgoing transfer. However, if you use Smart Wallets or Multisig (e.g., Safe) where a relayer executes transactions, you'll need to manually confirm your activity via the website button.
faq.q8: Can DEX or dApp approvals affect my inheritance?
faq.a8: No. Token allowances do not affect your inheritance timer. Only your direct actions – transfers, confirmActivity, or vault setup – count as presence confirmation. A third party using transferFrom() cannot reset your timer. Your inheritance will process even with active DEX allowances.

security.allowance_text: Only your direct actions count as presence confirmation: token transfers, activity confirmations, or vault setup. DEX swaps via allowances do not reset the timer. If you trade on a DEX, remember to confirm your activity separately.

disclaimer.title: Legal Information
disclaimer.modal_subtitle: Please read before connecting your wallet
disclaimer.s1_text: The WILL token is a utility token solely for managing digital inheritance within WillChain. Holding the token does not grant rights to profits, company shares, or any rights associated with securities.
disclaimer.s2_text: The token burning mechanism is a technical tool for cleaning the network of inactive participants, not a promise of market value appreciation. We do not guarantee liquidity or future asset prices.
disclaimer.s3_text: The user is fully responsible for maintaining activity or performing manual confirmation before the set deadline expires. Loss of access to private keys or missing the deadline will result in irreversible loss of access to funds.
disclaimer.s4_text: The protocol is deployed on Base (Ethereum L2). You agree to the risks associated with smart contract vulnerabilities or blockchain network updates. This is experimental software – use at your own risk.
disclaimer.s5_text: The user is obliged to independently verify that the use of WillChain does not contradict the legislation of their jurisdiction.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept the terms. I understand that I am solely responsible for my activity and potential loss of assets.

tiers.title: Vault Tier
tiers.subtitle: Your tier is determined by your WILL holdings

transfer_modal.title: Send WILL
transfer_modal.subtitle: Sending automatically confirms your activity
transfer_modal.activity_reset_hint: Directly sending WILL resets your activity timer. DEX swaps via allowance do not reset it — use confirmActivity() to confirm presence.
